baseline.note: ledger totals that predate canonical lifecycle accounting (accounted explicitly)

reconciliation.scope_note: lifecycle counts are cumulative since canonical accounting began; baseline counts are legacy ledger totals that predate it; ledger/gate totals == baseline + accounted.

learning.note: the bot's own settled-trade experience (calibrated edge model) adjusts the directional probability; it grows as more trades settle. The execution-quality gate, paper-realism, and reconciliation are unchanged and still veto every trade — learning can never bypass them.

state.reason: no imminent macro or headline risk

last_note.summary: DOWN_STRONG and v4 signals in trending regimes with z-score -1..1, dead volume, range_bottom, and 60-240s TTC show confirmed positive EV (avg_ev_after_cost ~0.10-0.13) and win-rates above breakeven with n>=14-96; overall sample remains small (127 trades) with mixed realized pnl due to variance and UP-side underperformance. Most other buckets (e.g., UP_WEAK, volume spike, <60s TTC, range_top) are noise or negative with insufficient samples after n<8 filter. No material change from prior (first analysis) as evidence is initial.
warnings: Total realized pnl negative despite positive avg_ev; high variance in small n buckets
Strong DOWN bias in accepted trades (91 vs 35 UP) may reflect asymmetric rejection
Many buckets still n<20 so calibration weak
focus_next: Accumulate more DOWN_STRONG + range_bottom + dead-volume samples
Track zscore -1..1 and 60-240s TTC cohorts for stability
Monitor v4 vs v3 divergence as n grows

history.summary: DOWN_STRONG signals (n=66, wr=0.606) and range_bottom entries (n=36, wr=0.806) show confirmed positive EV with n>=8 and pnl>0 after costs; lower_wick_rejection, dead volume, and bearish_aligned mtf also hold above breakeven. Most UP buckets, short ttc<60s, and volume_spike remain negative or noisy. Overall sample (119 settled) still small with mixed total pnl.

DOWN direction and DOWN_STRONG signals show confirmed positive EV with n=90/67, wr~0.6, and positive realized pnl after costs; range_bottom (n=38, wr=0.79, +63 pnl), lower_wick_rejection, dead volume, normal_trend ADX, bearish_aligned MTf, and unknown CVD also clear profitability thresholds. Most UP trades, short TTC<60s, range_top, and volume spike buckets remain firmly negative with n>=8. Overall book still net negative due to UP and adverse regime drag.

DOWN signals (esp. DOWN_STRONG n=67 wr=0.597 and DOWN_WEAK n=23 wr=0.609) plus range_bottom (n=38 wr=0.79), lower_wick_rejection (n=17 wr=0.706), dead volume (n=48 wr=0.604), and bearish_aligned mtf (n=44 wr=0.591) show confirmed positive pnl and wr above breakeven with n>=8 and positive avg_ev_after_cost. Most other buckets (UP, short ttc<60s, volume spike, 1..2 zscore) are noise or losing despite some wr>0.5. Overall realized pnl remains negative (-28.6 USD) even as per-trade EV stays positive.

With 122 settled trades, DOWN direction (esp. DOWN_STRONG, n=67-90) and select regimes like range_bottom (n=38, wr=0.79), lower_wick_rejection (n=17, wr=0.71), dead volume (n=48, wr=0.60), and normal_trend ADX (n=34, wr=0.65) show win-rates above typical breakeven with positive avg_ev_after_cost, indicating confirmed edge; most other buckets remain noise given negative aggregate pnl and n<8 filters. UP signals, short ttc, volume spikes, and range_top are clear underperformers. No prior analysis exists so all patterns are baseline.
changes_since_last: Initial analysis - no prior patterns to compare

history.summary: With 123 settled trades, DOWN signals (esp. DOWN_STRONG n=67) show wr=0.6 and modestly positive pnl while UP remains negative; range_bottom (n=38 wr=0.79), lower_wick_rejection (n=17 wr=0.71), dead volume (n=49 wr=0.61), normal_trend ADX (n=34 wr=0.65) and zscore -1..1 (n=80 wr=0.6) stand out as confirmed positive-EV buckets with n>=8. Most other slices hover near breakeven wr with negative realized pnl after costs, indicating the edge is still fragile and regime-dependent.
changes_since_last: first analysis; sample now 123 trades, no prior reference

history.summary: DOWN signals (esp. DOWN_STRONG/DOWN_WEAK) show confirmed edge with n>=23, win_rate ~0.59-0.61 and positive avg_ev_after_cost after costs; overall sample remains small (125 settled) with net-negative realized pnl driven by UP and short-ttc failures. High-win-rate buckets like range_bottom (0.79, n=38), dead volume (0.63, n=51), and -1..1 zscore (0.61, n=82) appear robust while UP, <60s ttc, volume_spike, and 1..2 zscore buckets are clear underperformers. No prior analysis provided so changes cannot be assessed.

DOWN signals (esp. DOWN_STRONG n=67 win=0.597 and DOWN_WEAK n=23 win=0.609) show confirmed positive EV with n>=8 and win-rates above breakeven after costs; range_bottom (n=38 win=0.79 pnl+63.6), volume=dead (n=51 win=0.628 pnl+27), zscore=-1..1 (n=82 win=0.61 pnl+17), lower_wick_rejection (n=17 win=0.706), and bearish_aligned mtf (n=44 win=0.591) are the clearest profitable regimes while UP, short ttc<60s, and volume_spike remain negative. v4 indicator and trending/hurst regimes have volume but mixed pnl, indicating partial confirmation. Overall sample of 125 is still small with many buckets near breakeven EV~0.10.

DOWN_STRONG and v4 signals in trending regimes with z-score -1..1, dead volume, range_bottom, and 60-240s TTC show confirmed positive EV (avg_ev_after_cost ~0.10-0.13) and win-rates above breakeven with n>=14-96; overall sample remains small (127 trades) with mixed realized pnl due to variance and UP-side underperformance. Most other buckets (e.g., UP_WEAK, volume spike, <60s TTC, range_top) are noise or negative with insufficient samples after n<8 filter. No material change from prior (first analysis) as evidence is initial.

analyst_A.note: observe-only Grok research analyst that LEARNS the bot's trading patterns from its growing settled-trade/selectivity/late-window evidence and refines across cycles (continuity). Diagnostics only — never trades.

predictor_B.note: observe-only Grok P(up) per signal; graded vs realized BTC move before it could ever be trusted; never places/sizes/bypasses a trade.

grok_signal_intel.note: A analyzes signal-learning performance; B predicts P(up) per signal and is graded vs realized moves. Both observe-only — never place/size/bypass a trade; the execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

aggression.note: loosens (more explore/looser exploit/larger size) as acted trades profit; tightens on losses; circuit breaker is the hard floor.

grok_decider.note: Grok decides; bot executes (paper). shadow=decide+grade only (no trade), follow=engine follows direction/size subject to the deterministic floor (execution realism, risk caps, freshness). Fail-closed -> no_trade.

headlines: BTC testing $62k support amid recent $171M liquidation wave (hours ago)
Spot BTC ETFs saw $68M outflows on June 22 (recent flow update)
No major macro prints, regulatory headlines, or large liquidations in last 30 min

verifier.note: independent Claude maker-checker; can only veto/shrink a Grok-proposed paper trade, never force one; fail-open; PAPER ONLY.

last_note.summary: Bot shows 53.4% win rate on 384 settled trades with -$62.90 PnL and 0.88 profit factor—losses outsize wins by 30%. TradingView DOWN signals exhibit 60% hit rate (90 samples), but overall the strategy bleeds on execution costs and adverse selection. No context shows robust, sample-backed edge above costs.

knob_recommendations.reason: Current 'high' bucket (n=1) has insufficient evidence; raise threshold to filter weak signals
Avg loss $3.98 vs win $3.07 (1.30x); cap at 1.1x to force better entry prices or smaller position sizing
83 rejects for price below floor; lower from 0.50 to 0.47 to access more DOWN candidates (60% hit rate)
Zero tier-A contexts; lower from current threshold to enable tier promotions with 50+ samples

new_lessons.rule: TradingView DOWN signals show 60% hit rate (n=90) vs 50% UP (n=36); isolate DOWN-only flow if execution costs can be reduced below 0.5% per round-trip
53.4% win rate is negated by 1.30x loss:win ratio; never trade unless avg_loss <= 1.05 * avg_win, enforced pre-execution
hurst_regime=trending shows n=1 win but zero statistical power; require min 30 samples before trusting any regime bucket
83 rejects for underdog_price_below_floor vs 58 for negative_ev; floor may be blocking best DOWN opportunities—test 0.45-0.48 range
Brier 0.227 vs baseline 0.25 and edge_model shows reasonable calibration, but profits fail; edge exists in prediction but dies in execution—focus on cost reduction, not signal tuning

research_loop.note: strategy-layer research meta-loop: independent model proposes exploit/avoid contexts + bounded knob nudges + lessons. Observe-only unless auto_apply (whitelisted+bounded). PAPER ONLY.

recent.rule: ttc 60-120s bucket (n=2) lost money; <60s won both; reject mid-window entry until n>20 sample
383 trades, 53.3% win, -$66 PnL, 0.88 profit factor: no aggregate edge; do NOT scale capital
markov_state=stale_polymarket_down (n=2, 100% win, +$6.07) warrants targeted exploration (target n=30)
TradingView DOWN 60% vs UP 48.6% hit—direction matters more than aggregate 56.8%
60-70% bucket: 5 samples, 20% empirical up—overconfident model, reject until 30+ samples
EV drop 11.0%→10.4% plus loss>win means sub-1% net edge insufficient for 5-min noise
232 DOWN vs 151 UP fills, DOWN 53.4% win vs UP 53.0%—DOWN slight edge, UP neutral
TradingView DOWN signals show 60% hit rate (n=90) vs 50% UP (n=36); isolate DOWN-only flow if execution costs can be reduced below 0.5% per round-trip
53.4% win rate is negated by 1.30x loss:win ratio; never trade unless avg_loss <= 1.05 * avg_win, enforced pre-execution
hurst_regime=trending shows n=1 win but zero statistical power; require min 30 samples before trusting any regime bucket
83 rejects for underdog_price_below_floor vs 58 for negative_ev; floor may be blocking best DOWN opportunities—test 0.45-0.48 range
Brier 0.227 vs baseline 0.25 and edge_model shows reasonable calibration, but profits fail; edge exists in prediction but dies in execution—focus on cost reduction, not signal tuning

loops.note: formalized sub-loops (data/signal/verify/execute/risk/research/news/lessons); each has a trigger + skill + verifier + verifiable stop. PAPER ONLY.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

cex_lead_edge.promotion_rule: n>=min AND wilson_lower(win_rate)>breakeven AND Brier_cex<Brier_market AND avg_pnl>0
cex_lead_edge.note: CEX-lead latency edge; benchmark is the MARKET price (already ~0.21 Brier). SHADOW grades only; GATED can PROPOSE a side on a proven bucket but the execution-quality gate + safety floor remain authoritative. PAPER ONLY.

learned_selectivity_gate.note: rejects ONLY buckets confidently below their own breakeven win-rate (Wilson upper bound < breakeven AND net-negative PnL); coin-flip / not-significant buckets are NOT rejected. Can only make the bot MORE selective — never trades, resizes, or bypasses the execution gate. Exploration tracked separately.

counterfactual.note: in-sample replay using final accumulated bucket evidence (diagnostic estimate)

gate.note: when enabled, only late-window AND high-conviction setups may trade; can only PREVENT trades, never force/size/bypass the execution gate.

edge_measurement.note: observe-only: grades whether late-window high-conviction trades win more (cohort vs other) from live settled trades; never affects trading.

tradingview_latest_signal.indicator_name: Hermes BTC Pulse Composite v4 Orderflow Loose

BTCUSD.indicator_name: Hermes BTC Pulse Composite v4 Orderflow Loose

tradingview.note: TradingView alerts are candidate signals only — they cannot place, resize, or bypass trades; the strategy + execution gate remain the sole trade authority.

edge_vs_5min_outcome.note: observe-only: did the TradingView signal at entry predict the 5-min Chainlink outcome (signal_hit_rate vs baseline_up_rate), and did aligning help the bot win (aligned vs opposed bot_win_rate)? Never affects trading.

rsi_trend.note: observe-only: learns P(next 5-min outcome | RSI alert trend state) from the alert history and scores its own next-window predictions. Never trades.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

signal_gate.note: when active, a paper trade is taken only if a fresh TradingView signal agrees with the side; it can only PREVENT trades, never force or bypass them.

context_gate.note: hard prior gate: blocks proven-losing entry contexts (volume spikes, noise regime, far-from-resolution) before enough samples exist for the learned selectivity gate. Can only PREVENT trades — never forces, sizes, or bypasses the execution gate, which remains the sole trade authority.
